prompt: Show a paginated list of closed support threads in the right pane, 25 per page
expected_avoid: fresh AlignUI table that bypasses the @dash registry
expected_use: @dash/data-table OR @dash/table primitive (per decision tree, depending on sort/filter need)
halo-dash-be envelope { status: 'Success'|'Failed', data, pagination } string status
lg: breakpoint as primary, no mobile drawer fallback
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Tables (rules L31-35); halo-dash-be envelope (rules L622); halo desktop-first policy (glossary L120)
context_notes: Closed-threads list = read-only with sort optional. If no sort/filter, use the simpler @dash/table primitive instead of @dash/data-table. Pagination state local to right pane (useState) — does not warrant Jotai/Zustand here.
